documentation.description:
-
  @summary
  Ada Embedded Library

  @description
  AdaCL Embedded provides lightweight, efficient components for embedded programming on the Raspberry Pi and similar
  platforms.

  The library is designed for predictability and low resource usage. It favours static data structures, bounded
  strings, and minimal runtime overhead. Object-oriented features are used sparingly and only where they provide
  clear benefits without hidden costs.
